description_long: This lounge object is a modern, enclosed booth structure designed for urban environments, featuring two main sections: a larger seating area and a smaller adjoining compartment. The primary section contains two cushioned bench seats facing each other, separated by a central table, and is enclosed with transparent glass walls and a door for privacy. The interior is equipped with a large wall-mounted screen, suggesting suitability for meetings or collaborative work. The adjoining compartment appears to be a private space, possibly for phone calls or focused work, also enclosed with glass. The exterior is predominantly finished in light gray panels with clean, minimalistic lines, and the structure is supported by a sturdy frame. The overall design emphasizes comfort, privacy, and functionality, making it ideal for public spaces such as parks, plazas, or office lobbies.
description: A modern, glass-enclosed lounge booth with facing cushioned benches, a central table, and an adjoining private compartment, designed for comfort and privacy in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass entrance, two facing cushioned benches, central table, and large screen inside the main booth.
description_view_1: Direct head-on view of the entrance, highlighting the symmetry of the seating arrangement and the transparent door.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid exterior panels and the depth of both the main lounge and adjoining compartment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid back panels of both sections, with minimal visible features.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two long, rectangular seat cushions on each bench, fixed in place, with matching back cushions running the length of the benches; all cushions are uniform in size and attached.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, full-length backrests at standard height, integrated with the benches, featuring a flat, unsegmented design with no visible tufting or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests present; benches are open at the sides for easy access.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; benches are built-in and supported by the booth's structural base, giving a floating appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
